title: eusei: an HTTP/JSON API (Rust + axum) for the SEI SOAP Web Services
description: eusei translates the SOAP Web Services of Brazil's SEI (Sistema Eletrônico de Informações) into a clean HTTP/JSON API, written in Rust with axum. It exposes read-only queries over processes, documents, publications, blocks, proceedings and 15 auxiliary lists, mirroring the queries of the R package rsei. It is a single self-contained binary that also serves its landing page and documentation (Tailwind CSS v4, vendored, no CDN), authenticates clients with a Bearer token, and never exposes the SEI key to the caller.
